title: Deterministic Mission execution-gate to human_inbox row join

policy.authority: Mission.open_gates controls inclusion and pending/actionable counts; human_inbox rows are payload projection only
policy.ordering: Mission open_gates tuple order; row order does not affect output ordering
policy.duplicates: first valid human_inbox row per id wins; duplicate rows never duplicate output
policy.missing_row: emit a deterministic placeholder with prompt/options and GateRecord.reason preserved as an explicit unavailable, non-actionable item
policy.stale_row: retain full row payload, add actionable=false and mission_gate_status=stale
policy.terminal_orphan: terminal status wins for both matched and missing gates; retain full matched payload or reason-bearing placeholder, add actionable=false and mission_gate_status=terminal_orphan
policy.summary_parity: when gates exist, pending summary counts only joined pending rows with actionable=true

red_green.red: pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py -k 'joins_open_gates or join_uses_first_duplicate' -> 2 failed (inbox_items was empty)
red_green.edge_red: pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py -k 'missing_row_placeholder_preserves_gate_reason or terminal_precedence_marks_missing' -> 2 failed before hardening
red_green.green: pytest -q tests/test_mission_read_model.py -k 'missing_row_placeholder_preserves_gate_reason or terminal_precedence_marks_missing' -> 2 passed; selected suite -> 40 passed, 1 deselected before Todo 1 projection edits

verification.stable_suite: selected suite after hardening -> 40 passed, 1 deselected; the one deselected test is the Todo 1 projection-dependent legacy phase assertion
verification.ruff: ruff check src/agent_lab/mission/read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model_api.py -> All checks passed
verification.malformed_input: run human_inbox as a dict; returned missing-row placeholder and pending_count=0 without exception
verification.stale_state: repeated read-model computation is deterministic; gate order and duplicate first-row selection are covered by tests
verification.misleading_success_output: curl returned HTTP 200 with non-empty joined gate row, pending_count=1, pending_questions=1
verification.dirty_worktree: detected pre-existing parent-agent edits in application.py, repository.py, projection files, and .omo artifacts; no unrelated files changed by this task
verification.flaky_tests: pre-hardening selected suite repeated three times with identical 38 passed / 1 deselected result; post-hardening targeted edge tests passed

manual_qa.cleanup: stopped uvicorn on port 8766 and removed /tmp/agent-lab-m6-inbox-curl plus curl captures

dependency: The existing test_read_model_route_projects_mission_journal currently expects phase_label=READY, but concurrent Todo 1 projection changes mission_loop.phase to EXECUTE_QUEUE. This failing assertion is outside the join files and was left untouched per parent instruction.
